description: Clean-code rule definitions. Single source of truth for lint, scoring, and SKILL.md references.

rules.name: KISS
rules.description: Avoid accidental complexity, primitive abuse, unnecessary mutable state

rules.name: YAGNI
rules.description: Remove speculative abstractions not justified by current requirements

rules.name: DRY
rules.description: Reduce knowledge duplication (not syntactic repetition)

rules.name: SRP
rules.description: Separate things that change for different reasons

rules.name: CQS
rules.description: Divide state mutation from information queries

rules.name: Naming
rules.description: Maintain domain vocabulary and naming consistency

rules.name: Impact Scope
rules.description: Impact scope too broad for single change

rules.name: Hidden Coupling
rules.description: Hidden coupling makes impact unclear

rules.name: Mixed Changes
rules.description: Behavior and structure changed simultaneously without safety net

rules.name: Migration Path
rules.description: Risky refactoring lacks incremental migration path

rules.name: Regression Tests
rules.description: No regression tests for changed behavior

rules.name: Test Quality
rules.description: Tests too broad, unstable, or slow

rules.name: Tight Coupling
rules.description: Hard to test due to tight coupling

rules.name: Test Expressiveness
rules.description: Test names/assertions don't express behavior

rules.name: Nondeterminism
rules.description: Nondeterministic elements (time, randomness, dispatchers) not boundary-isolated

rules.name: Structured Concurrency
rules.description: CoroutineScope lifecycle violations (GlobalScope, missing SupervisorJob, unmanaged scope)

rules.name: Flow/Channel Misuse
rules.description: Cold/hot confusion, side effects in collect, implicit event loss

rules.name: Null Safety Breach
rules.description: Platform types, lateinit abuse, unsafe casts bypassing null safety

rules.name: Scope Function Abuse
rules.description: Excessive let/run/apply/also/with chaining (3+ levels)

rules.name: Data Class Contract
rules.description: var in data class, inheritance breaking equals/hashCode, copy() bypassing validation
